examples: Plenty of whirlybird pilots will be keen to get their hands on the real thing.
Establishments projects of tourism: iron chain bridge above the canyon, whirlybird tour project, water amusement, and geographic museum of glacier relics.
Maples make those little whirlybird seeds you see spiraling down in droves each spring. Their papery little wings keep them aloft so they can find a good place to germinate and make a new maple.
The first team to make real progress was a group of students from California Polytechnic State University, whose ¥
whirlybird flew for about eight seconds in December 1989.
